creator: stevenschlansker@berkeley.edu
text:
Building innd-2.4.5 and perl-5.10.0_3 from ports ends up with innd segmentation faulting in libperl.so whenever it tries to start.

A more complete discussion is available here
https://lists.isc.org/pipermail/inn-workers/2009-January/016430.html

There are two patches attached to an email in the thread that appear to fix the problem on my machine

Fix: 

Patches in above mail thread
How-To-Repeat: Install said packages; innd will not work.
